overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a character walking through a rain-soaked futuristic city at night. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers, palm trees, and wet reflective streets typical of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The character passes various storefronts including a pawn shop, encounters other pedestrians, and descends stairs to a lower plaza level.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked city sidewalk at night, passing a red vending kiosk and concrete benches. Palm trees line the path while neon-lit glass towers rise in the background, reflecting off the wet pavement.

segments.scene_description: The street opens up to reveal more of the city skyline as a futuristic vehicle drives past on the right. The character continues walking along the waterfront barrier as the pawn shop recedes behind.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and descends a wide concrete staircase leading to a lower waterfront plaza. A pedestrian in a red jacket walks ahead down the stairs, while the neon-lit skyscraper cluster dominates the skyline ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked futuristic city street that gradually descends into a lower waterfront plaza. It begins by trailing a character along a wet sidewalk past a red vending kiosk and concrete benches, with neon-lit glass towers and palm trees reflecting off the pavement. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts past a brightly lit pawn shop and a red-haired pedestrian resting on a bench under the glow of digital billboards. The street then opens up to reveal a wider skyline as a futuristic vehicle drives past, leading the character along a waterfront barrier. Finally, the camera follows the character as they descend a wide concrete staircase behind another pedestrian in a red jacket, moving toward a lower plaza dominated by a cluster of towering neon skyscrapers.
